simple_types.name: CLK_ADC_CTRL_AUXSRC_Field
simple_types.code:
type CLK_ADC_CTRL_AUXSRC_Field is

   clksrc_pll_sys,
   rosc_clksrc_ph,
   xosc_clksrc,
   clksrc_gpin0,
   clksrc_gpin1)
  with Size => 3;

record_types.name: CLK_ADC_CTRL_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_4
fields.description: Selects the auxiliary clock source, will glitch when switching

fields.name: KILL
fields.description: Starts and stops the clock generator cleanly

fields.name: Reserved_12_15
fields.description:
This delays the enable signal by up to 3 cycles of the input clock\n
This must be set before the clock is enabled to have any effect

fields.name: Reserved_18_19
fields.description:
An edge on this signal shifts the phase of the output by 1 cycle of
the input clock\n This can be done at any time

record_types.name: CLK_ADC_DIV_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_7
fields.description: Integer component of the divisor, 0 -> divide by 2^16

record_types.name: CLK_GPOUT0_CTRL_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_4
fields.description: Selects the auxiliary clock source, will glitch when switching

fields.name: KILL
fields.description: Starts and stops the clock generator cleanly

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Enables duty cycle correction for odd divisors

fields.name: Reserved_13_15
fields.description:
This delays the enable signal by up to 3 cycles of the input clock\n
This must be set before the clock is enabled to have any effect

fields.name: Reserved_18_19
fields.description:
An edge on this signal shifts the phase of the output by 1 cycle of
the input clock\n This can be done at any time

record_types.name: CLK_GPOUT0_DIV_Register

fields.name: FRAC

record_types.name: CLOCKS_Peripheral

fields.name: CLK_GPOUT0_CTRL
fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_GPOUT0_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_GPOUT0_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_REF_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_REF_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.name: CLK_SYS_CTRL
fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_SYS_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_SYS_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.name: CLK_PERI_CTRL
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_PERI_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.name: CLK_USB_CTRL
fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_USB_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_USB_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.name: CLK_ADC_CTRL
fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_ADC_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: CLK_ADC_SELECTED
fields.description: Clock control, can be changed on-the-fly (except for auxsrc)

fields.name: CLK_RTC_CTRL
fields.description: Clock divisor, can be changed on-the-fly

fields.name: CLK_RTC_DIV
fields.description: Indicates which src is currently selected (one-hot)

fields.name: FC0_REF_KHZ
fields.description:
Minimum pass frequency in kHz. This is optional. Set to 0 if you are
not using the pass/fail flags

fields.name: FC0_MIN_KHZ
fields.description:
Maximum pass frequency in kHz. This is optional. Set to 0x1ffffff if
you are not using the pass/fail flags

fields.name: FC0_MAX_KHZ
fields.description:
Delays the start of frequency counting to allow the mux to settle\n
Delay is measured in multiples of the reference clock period

fields.name: FC0_DELAY
fields.description:
The test interval is 0.98us * 2**interval, but let's call it 1us *
2**interval\n The default gives a test interval of 250us

fields.name: FC0_INTERVAL
fields.description:
Clock sent to frequency counter, set to 0 when not required\n Writing
to this register initiates the frequency count

fields.name: FC0_STATUS
fields.description: Result of frequency measurement, only valid when status_done=1

fields.name: SLEEP_EN1
fields.description: indicates the state of the clock enable

fields.name: ENABLED0
fields.description: indicates the state of the clock enable

FC0_STATUS_Register

fields.name: Reserved_9_11
fields.description: Read-only. Waiting for test clock to start

fields.name: Reserved_17_19
fields.description:
Read-only. Test clock slower than expected, only valid when
status_done=1

fields.name: Reserved_21_23
fields.description:
Read-only. Test clock faster than expected, only valid when
status_done=1

fields.name: Reserved_25_27
fields.description: Read-only. Test clock stopped during test
